spec_match.rationale: Correct implementation using standard transaction events, dynamic write ranges, and count verifiers.

interactive.rationale: Superb interaction. Incorporates deep custom inputs, active color cards changing states synchronously, a dynamic statistics block, and an event logger.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect. Directly demonstrates how WAL serialization protects multi-tab concurrently raced transactions from silently failing.

edge_cases.rationale: Safely manages up to 12 concurrent transactions and up to 200 items each.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/5161589557821440 entry.

design_system.rationale: Monochrome buttons, clean spacing rules, and elegant state transitions.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5161589557821440 at the bottom of the page.

summary: The transaction-race-demo is an exceptional race conditions playground, but fails compliance due to a missing ChromeStatus link.
